name: Making Bubble Bath
recipeInstructions: Any good soap can be used to make bubble bath, but castile is generally preferred. Before the soap can be made into bubble bath, it must be converted to a liquid. Grate 1 bar of castile soap into 1 quart of warm water and allow the mixture to dissolve completely. Two ingredients can convert liquid soap into bubble bath: Glycerine (3 drops) or Coconut oil (2 ounces). Both are known for their skin-softening properties and ability to create lather.
